coordinator.name: claude
responsibilities: Direct work for libbyclaudecode, Gemini, GPT, and other agents
Unblock issues, bring in specialists as needed
Keep user updated with consolidated status
coordinator.currentStatus: Phase 2 infrastructure ready - agents can execute in parallel

tasksCompleted: Rebuilt index.html v2.04.0 with working UI
Built direct data import endpoint (no connectors)
Generated sample fixture data for briefing console
claude.notes: Phase 2 infrastructure complete. Ready to direct libbyclaudecode, Gemini, and GPT work.

libbyclaudecode.role: Design implementation, UI polish, feature development
currentTasks: Task 3: Build iPad briefing console (1.5-2 hrs)
libbyclaudecode.notes: Ready to start. Sample data and architecture docs prepared. Focus on making confidence model hard-enforced (not optional).

gemini.role: Drive research, data extraction, file discovery
currentTasks: Search Matthew's Drive for 2001-2015 medical records
Report findings in structured markdown format
resourcesReady: Import endpoint: POST /api/import-sources (format: markdown or json)
gemini.notes: Ready to start. Prompt is copy-paste ready. Output will be imported via /api/import-sources endpoint (no connectors needed).

gpt.notes: On standby. Available for architectural decisions or code review as needed.

currentPhase.name: Unified Architecture Implementation (Claude + GPT + Libby)
currentPhase.core_principle: State-first, not chat-first. Evidence in → Claims → Confidence → Human approval → iPad briefing console
parallelWorkstreams: libbyclaudecode: Schemas + Confidence + iPad UI + Meeting Mode
Gemini: Drive source discovery + structured reporting
priority: 1. Define all 12 schemas (source_document, evidence_card, claim, timeline_event, matter, task, contact, interaction, draft, decision, alert, agent_run)
2. Implement confidence model as hard schema (Confirmed/Draft/Inferred/Missing/Needs Review enums)
3. Build iPad briefing console (6 tabs: Summary, Timeline, Evidence, Live Notes, Responses, Tasks)
4. Implement meeting mode (questions → answers → follow-ups → recap)
5. Find missing sources from Drive (Gemini task)
8. Test with real data (ODSP scenario, DSO scenario, Rogers scenario)
currentPhase.successCriteria: See ARCHITECTURE_UNIFIED.md MVP Acceptance Criteria section

nextMilestone.name: v2.05.0 - Phase 2 Complete
criteria: ✅ Confidence model hard-enforced (can't save without it)
✅ Meeting mode captures questions → answers → follow-ups
✅ Sample data imported and visible in briefing console

context.codebase_status: All Phase 1 committed to main. Phase 2 branch ready.

next_agent_actions.gemini: Copy GEMINI_PROMPT_READY_TO_SEND.txt, search Drive, post to /api/import-sources
next_agent_actions.claude: Monitor progress, coordinate blockers, maintain conversation.json heartbeat

handoff.message: Phase 2 infrastructure is ready. All three agents can start parallel work immediately. Sample data and import endpoints prepared. Update conversation.json after each milestone.

dimensions.name: Code Quality

dimensions.name: Communication
dimensions.description: Clear status updates, asks questions when stuck, proactive

collaboration.protocol: Update conversation.json after each major task
collaboration.heartbeat: Add entry to sessionHistory every time you complete a milestone
collaboration.handshake: Read conversation.json before starting, update it after finishing
collaboration.rating_feedback: After each session, rate the other agent on the 5 dimensions. Be honest and constructive.
